comment: lab1 TRAINING scenarios (6 of 8) held-in set for QL training. Held-OUT (test-only): 5, 8. Full sun coverage (ranks 0..3) so the lamp lever is in-distribution. Target Z1=bright(rank3).
description: sun=0, dark, lamp off -> must turn lamp on
sun=0, at target, lamp on -> hold
sun=1, dark, lamp off -> must turn lamp on
sun=1, at target, lamp on -> hold
sun=2, at target, lamp on -> hold
sun=3, rank2 from sun alone, lamp off -> must turn lamp on for rank3
